title: Enzymatic Disaggregation of Human Myometrium for 10X Single Cell RNA-seq
author: Aymara Mas
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bb5miq46

steps.title: Uterine tissues should be transported in...
steps.instruction: Uterine tissues should be transported in preservation solution (HypoThermosol® FRS) at 4 °C from the surgery room to the lab.

steps.title: Rinse the sample with wash buffer, removing blood or mucus
steps.instruction: Rinse the sample with wash buffer, removing blood or mucus.

steps.title: [Optional] If after centrifugation there is...
steps.instruction: [Optional] If after centrifugation there is a ring of red blood cells, add ACKL lysis buffer, consisting in hypotonic shock, and incubate at 37 °C for 00:05:00 . Then, follow step 7 again.

steps.title: Add 400 µL Tryple Select Enzyme...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL Tryple Select Enzyme to resuspended media containing cells and mix thoroughly by pipetting. Incubate for 00:10:00 - 00:15:00 at 37 °C and centrifuge at 300 rpm, °C, .

steps.title: Count the total number of cells...
steps.instruction: Count the total number of cells (at least twice on two different cell counters).

steps.title: Place wet tissue under a petri dish
steps.instruction: Place wet tissue under a petri dish. Isolate with a sterile scalpel the myometrial layer by removing the endometrium, serosa and laser-burnt zones.

steps.title: Mechanical disaggregation by chopping and thoroughly...
steps.instruction: Mechanical disaggregation by chopping and thoroughly mincing up the tissue into small pieces (<1 mm 3 ).

steps.title: Transfer contents to 50 ml falcon...
steps.instruction: Transfer contents to 50 ml falcon tubes containing 30 mL of enzyme buffer. Tighten lid, seal with parafilm and incubate at 37 °C overnight horizontally.

steps.title: Afterwards, cell suspensions should be filtered...
steps.instruction: Afterwards, cell suspensions should be filtered through 100 to 50-μm polyethylene filters to remove cellular clumps and undigested tissue.

steps.title: Centrifuge the filtered medium 400 x g, °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the filtered medium 400 x g, °C, 5 minutes . Remove supernatant and add at least 1 mL of resuspension buffer (depending of the pellet content).

steps.title: Add 100 µL DNAse I to...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL DNAse I to digest the extracellular genomic DNA and mix thoroughly by pipetting. Incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Add at least 1 mL of resuspension buffer
steps.instruction: Add at least 1 mL of resuspension buffer. Filter through a 40 μm cell strainer and centrifuge at 400 x g, °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend the content...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend the content in at least 1 mL of resuspension buffer (depending of the pellet content).

steps.title: [Optional] Resuspend cells in freezing medium...
steps.instruction: [Optional] Resuspend cells in freezing medium to a concentration of 1 x 10 6 cells for storage in cryogenic vials.
